ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-15-2024 Off Calendar

Notice Of Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Feb-28-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Lydia M. Villarreal; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:25 am and concluding at 9:57 am.

Plaintiff Richard Nguyen is present via zoom video conference represented by Michael Vroman, Esq., placed under oath and testifies.
Defendant Fe Nguyen not appearing.

Plaintiff presents summary of facts, claims and an offer of proof.

Plaintiff Richard Nguyen is examined by the Court.

The matter is submitted.

The Court takes this matter under submission. (D505)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-04-2024 Continued To Apr-09-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Dec-29-2023 Continued To Feb-23-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Maria Evangelista; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:22 am and concluding at 9:29 am.

Plaintiff Richard Nguyen is present via zoom video conference, represented by Michael Vroman, Esq. and placed under oath.
Defendant Fe Nguyen not appearing.

The Court addresses plaintiff's counsel regarding Service of the request for court judgment and filing of a Declaration re: Attorneys Fees.

Plaintiff's counsel requests a continuance to cure the issues raised by the Court.

Good cause appearing, the Court GRANTS Plaintiff's request for continuance.

The hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment is continued by the Court to February 23, 2024 at 9:00 am in Dept. 505. (D505)
